nav.faq: Su'aalaha Inta Badan La Is Weydiiyo

hero.title: Hal Fiidheyo U Beddel
hero.subtitle: Ku xidh xiriiriye ama soo geli fayl — AI si otomaatig ah u qoraa oo u dib-u-isticmaalaa nuxurkaaga qoraallo blog, taxane bulsho, wargeysyo, iyo wax badan.
hero.placeholder: Ku dheji xiriiriye YouTube, podcast, ama fiidheyo kasta...

steps.title: Ku Xidh ama Soo Geli
steps.desc: Ku rid xiriiriye YouTube, soo geli fayl maqal ah, ama ku dheji qoraal. Ma baahnid qaabayn — hal gujin oo kaliya.

steps.title: AI-ga ayaa Shaqadiisa Sixirka Ah Qabta
steps.desc: AI-gaagu wuxuu qoraa oo fahmaa nuxurkaaga, ka dibna si caqli leh ayuu ugu qoraa qaabka gaarka ah ee goob kasta.

steps.title: Ku Daabac Meel Kasta
steps.desc: Hel nuxur qurux badan oo loogu talagalay WeChat, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, blogs, iyo wax kale. Koobi, soo deji, ama la wadaag isla markiiba.

features.label: Astaamaha
features.title: Wax Kasta Oo Aad U Baahan Tahay Si Aad
features.subtitle: Waxaa loo dhisay abuurayaasha doonaya inay kordhiyaan nuxur kasta oo ay soo saaraan.

list.title: Dib-u-Qorista AI-ku Xoojiyay
list.desc: Ma aha oo kaliya qoraal-qaadis — AI-gaagu wuxuu fahmaa macnaha guud wuxuuna u qoraa si ku habboon codka iyo qaabka goob kasta.

list.title: 10 Qaabab Wax-soo-saarka
list.desc: Qoraallo blog, taxane Twitter, qoraallo LinkedIn, qoraalo Xiaohongshu, wargeysyo, qoraallo hoosaadyo SRT, maqaallo SEO, iyo wax kale.

list.title: 63+ Luuqadood
list.desc: Qor oo soo saar nuxur 63+ luuqadood. Waa ku habboon abuurayaasha caalamiga ah iyo dhagaystayaasha adduunka oo dhan.

list.title: Soo-saarka Streaming-ka
list.desc: Ka fiirso nuxurka oo xaraf xaraf u soo baxaya waqtiga dhabta ah. Uma baahnid sugitaan wareegyo culeys ah.

list.title: Hagaajinta Wada-hadalka
list.desc: La hadal wax-soo-saar kasta si aad u hagaajiso. Dheh "ka dhig gaaban" ama "ku dar emoji" — AI-ga ayaa isla markiiba ku dabaqa.

list.title: 6 Qaabab Dhoofinta
list.desc: U soo deji sida Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, ama CSV. Diyaar u ah daabacaadda.

list.title: La Wadaag & Wada Shaqee
list.desc: Abuur xiriiriyeyaal la wadaagi karo oo ay kooxdaagu daawadaan oo ay kula shaqeeyaan nuxurka.

list.title: Gaar & Aamin
list.desc: Nuxurkaagu waa kanaga. Faylasha si otomaatig ah ayaa loo tiraa ka dib habaynta. Ma jiro kaydin xog.

list.title: Ogaanshaha Goobta Caqliga Leh
list.desc: Ma ku dhejisay xiriiriye YouTube? Waxaan soo jeedinay blog + Twitter. Ma ku dhejisay Bilibili? Waxaan soo jeedinay WeChat + Xiaohongshu.

highlights.label: Sababta ailomo
highlights.title: Si Ka Duwan Ayaa Loo Dhisay.

formats.outputSubtitle: Isla mar soo saar wax walba — uma baahnid inaad marar badan ku shubto qalabka.
formats.langSubtitle: Qor oo soo saar nuxur 63+ luuqadood. Waa ku habboon abuurayaasha caalamiga ah iyo dhagaystayaasha adduunka oo dhan.

testimonials.text: "Ugu dambeyntii qalab fahmay qaabka shaqada abuurista nuxurka. Hal fiidheyo → dhammaan goobaha daqiiqado gudahood. Wax beddelay jadwalkayga nuxurka."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Hagaajinta wada-hadalku waa mid cajiib ah. Waxaan hagaajin karaa wax-soo-saar kasta anigoo la hadlaya. Tani waxay i badbaadisaa saacado toddobaad kasta."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Waxaan shaki ka qabay nuxurka AI-ga, laakiin tayadu si dhab ah ayay i yaabisay. Qaabaynta goobta gaarka ah waa mid sax ah."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "Anoo ah aasaase kali ah, qalabkani wuxuu i siiyaa wax-soo-saar koox nuxur ah. Qoraallo LinkedIn, blogs, tweets — dhammaantood hal fiidheyo."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Qiimaha
pricing.title: Fudud,
pricing.subtitle: Ka bilow bilaash, kor u qaad markaad u baahato wax badan. Ma jiraan kharashyo qarsoon.

creator.name: Abuuraha
creator.desc: Loogu talagalay abuurayaasha nuxurka ee halyeeyada ah

cta.title: Diyaar Ma U Tahay Inaad
cta.subtitle: Ku biir kumannaan abuurayaal ah oo fiidheyo kasta u beddela istaraatiijiyad nuxur oo dhamaystiran oo goobo badan leh. Ka bilow bilaash — uma baahnid kariid bangi.

footer.tagline: Dib-u-isticmaalka nuxurka ee AI-ku xoojiyay. Hal fiidheyo u beddel istaraatiijiyadda nuxurkaaga goobo badan leh oo dhan.
footer.builtWith: Waxaa loo dhisay abuurayaasha nuxurka ee adduunka oo dhan
